# ArcherLab
> Personal web development hub — 7+ side projects built with frontend, backend, and AI.

## About
ArcherLab is a personal dev hub by an indie developer. It combines frontend, backend, and AI to build prototypes and log experiments.

## Projects
- Cupid: Browser-based visual novel (dating sim) — play instantly, no install needed. 6 languages supported.
- HN Top 10: Daily Korean translation/summary of Hacker News top 10 stories.
- Golf Swing Analyzer: AI-powered golf swing analysis tool.
- IT History Timeline: Interactive timeline of IT history milestones.

## Links
- Main site: https://archerlab.dev
- Cupid: https://cupid.archerlab.dev
- HN News: https://news.archerlab.dev/hn

## Languages
- Korean (primary)
- English
